ddls:
CREATE TABLE "manufacturing_units" (
  "mfg_uid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each manufacturing unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the manufacturing unit */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the manufacturing unit */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the manufacturing unit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the unit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current operational status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the unit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mfg_uid")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "con_uid" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "mfg_uid" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturing unit */,
  "config_name" TEXT /* Name of the configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the configuration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the configuration (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the configuration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("con_uid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_mfg_uid FOREIGN KEY ("mfg_uid") REFERENCES manufacturing_units ("mfg_uid")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_levels" (
  "access_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access level */,
  "access_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the access level (e.g., Master, Log Book) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the access level */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the access level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documents" (
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each document */,
  "mfg_uid" INTEGER /* Reference to the manufacturing unit */,
  "con_uid" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration associated with the document */,
  "access_level_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the access level for the document */,
  "detail_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the document */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the document was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the document (e.g., active, archived) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the document */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the document file */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_mfg_uid FOREIGN KEY ("mfg_uid") REFERENCES manufacturing_units ("mfg_uid"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_access_level_id FOREIGN KEY ("access_level_id") REFERENCES access_levels ("access_level_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documents_con_uid FOREIGN KEY ("con_uid") REFERENCES configurations ("con_uid")
)

CREATE TABLE "document_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the document */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the document was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the document */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the document */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_document_access_logs_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, technician) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameters" (
  "param_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "con_uid" INTEGER /* Reference to the configuration associated with the parameter */,
  "param_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter */,
  "value" TEXT /* Current value of the parameter */,
  "history" TEXT /* History of parameter values */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the parameter was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the parameter (e.g., active, deprecated) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("param_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameters_con_uid FOREIGN KEY ("con_uid") REFERENCES configurations ("con_uid")
)

CREATE TABLE "parameter_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history record */,
  "param_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parameter being changed */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the parameter */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the parameter */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_parameter_history_param_id FOREIGN KEY ("param_id") REFERENCES parameters ("param_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user requesting access */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the request was made */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the request */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was approved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_requests_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_requests_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit trail record */,
  "doc_id" INTEGER /* ID of the document that was changed */,
  "change_details" TEXT /* Details of the changes made */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user making the change */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to make the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_doc_id FOREIGN KEY ("doc_id") REFERENCES documents ("doc_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
